description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black finish and metallic accents. The body is elongated with a prominent barrel, and the stock appears reinforced with a textured, possibly rubberized butt for recoil absorption. The receiver area is detailed with visible shell holders and mechanical components, suggesting a modern, high-capacity build. The grip is ergonomic, with a thumbhole design and a trigger guard that is both protective and contoured. The fore-end includes a visible pump mechanism, and the overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban environments. Subtle color variations, such as brown on the grip and metallic highlights, add to its visual complexity.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black matte finish, ergonomic grip, and visible pump-action mechanism. Features include a reinforced stock, shell holders, and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel opening, and symmetrical shell holders along the receiver.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the shotgun, ergonomic grip, pump mechanism, and shell holders.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the same key features as view 1, with additional detail on the stock and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a contoured lower edge and integrated finger groove
